CanvasLayout.description: The layout for a User Canvas

label.description: The label for the created Canvas

id.description: The ID of this Canvas Node

canvas_id.description: The ID of the Canvas that contains this Canvas Node

data_id.description: The Data Node ID associated with this Canvas Node

label.description: The user friendly label for this Canvas Node

type.description: The Biolink Type for this Canvas Node

x.description: The x-coordinate on the Canvas that contains this Canvas Node

y.description: The y-coordinate on the Canvas that contains this Canvas Node

hidden.description: A flag for if this Canvas Node is hidden

tags.description: Map of tag labels to null (tags are defined in the Canvas tags property)

time_created.description: The time this Canvas Node was created

time_edited.description: The last time this Canvas Node was edited

deleted.description: A flag for if this Canvas Node has been soft deleted

id.description: The ID of this Canvas Edge

canvas_id.description: The ID of the Canvas that contains this Canvas Edge

data_id.description: The Data Edge ID associated with this Canvas Edge

subject_id.description: The Canvas Node ID for the subject of this Canvas Edge

object_id.description: The Canvas Node ID for the object of this Canvas Edge

label.description: The user friendly label for this Canvas Edge

hidden.description: A flag for if this Canvas Edge is hidden

tags.description: Map of tag labels to null (tags are defined in the Canvas tags property)

time_created.description: The time this Canvas Edge was created

time_edited.description: The last time this Canvas Edge was edited

deleted.description: A flag for if this Canvas Edge has been soft deleted

id.description: The ID of this Canvas Annotation

canvas_id.description: The ID of the Canvas that contains this Canvas Annotation

text.description: The text contained in this Canvas Annotation

tags.description: Map of tag labels to null (tags are defined in the Canvas tags property)

time_edited.description: The last time this Canvas Annotation was edited

deleted.description: A flag for if this Canvas Annotation has been soft deleted
